hypothesis: If a stereochemistry-aware equivariant diffusion model (LoQI) with E/Z and R/S graph augmentations is trained on the near-DFT ChEMBL3D conformer dataset, then in ~25 steps it will generate stereochemically correct conformers with near-DFT energies (often lower than dataset minima) across diverse drug-like molecules and macrocycles because the equivariant architecture and explicit stereochemical encodings learn the quantum-mechanical energy landscape and chirality constraints.
